title: VIII. Uluslararası Osmanlı İstanbulu Sempozyumu Hakkında Önemli Duyuru
content:
ERTELEME

Değerli katılımcı,

Saygılarımla,

POSTPONED

Dear participants,

We would like to announce you that due to the global COVID-19 pandemic, the Eighth International Symposium on Ottoman Istanbul, scheduled for May 29-31, 2020 has been postponed.

We will inform you in due course.

Best regards,
